MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MARIA ARCELONA's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. All elements of cause of action for partition are alleged and drawn in conformity with the laws. CCP 436(b). Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
